calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Continued To Oct-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Hoffmann, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Kathleen S. Dyer.
Default was entered against defendant on June 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 18, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, September 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, FSB, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kathleen S. Dyer as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,613.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,169.66.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $479.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,272,75.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
